name: UBA : Suspicious Activity Followed by Exfiltration
notes: Detects scenario of suspicious activity followed by exfiltration within 24hrs.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Exfiltration match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Execution match
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Exfiltration match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Execution match
thresholds: when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Exfiltration match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Execution match
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Suspicious Activity Followed by Exfiltration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Exfiltration match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Execution match
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Suspicious Activity Followed by Exfiltration
